Its commitment to open-source principles and strong encryption makes it a trustworthy alternative for storing sensitive information securely in the cloud, free from third-party access.

title: Sync.com
shortDescription: Secure cloud storage with end-to-end encryption.
longDescription: Sync.com is a secure cloud storage provider that offers end-to-end encryption for all files, ensuring complete privacy and control over data. Unlike many other cloud services, Sync.com encrypts files before they leave your device, meaning only you can access them. It's a robust solution for personal backup, secure file sharing, and team collaboration, especially for those in regulated industries or with highly sensitive data. With features like version history, remote wipe, and a strong privacy policy, Sync.com provides peace of mind for storing important digital assets.

title: Tresorit
shortDescription: Ultra-secure cloud storage and file sharing for businesses.
longDescription: Tresorit is an ultra-secure cloud storage and file sharing service that offers end-to-end encryption by default for all data, both in transit and at rest. It's designed for businesses and enterprises requiring the highest levels of security and compliance (GDPR, HIPAA). Tresorit allows teams to share files securely, collaborate on documents, and manage permissions with confidence, knowing their data is protected from unauthorized access. Its focus on cryptographic security and enterprise-grade features makes it a premium choice for organizations handling sensitive information.

title: NordPass
shortDescription: Secure password manager from the creators of NordVPN.
longDescription: NordPass is a secure password manager developed by the creators of NordVPN, focusing on strong encryption and user privacy. It allows users to store passwords, credit card details, and secure notes in an encrypted vault, with seamless auto-fill and auto-save capabilities. NordPass offers features like a password generator, data breach scanner, and cross-device sync. It's designed for users who value simplicity and robust security, offering a trustworthy solution for managing digital credentials and improving online safety with the backing of a well-known security brand.
features: Secure notes and credit card storage

title: Dashlane

Julius AI generates insights, creates charts, and performs complex calculations, making data science accessible to a wider audience. It's an invaluable tool for business analysts, researchers, students, and anyone who needs to quickly extract meaningful information and present findings from their datasets.
features: Supports various data types (spreadsheets, text, images)

title: Gamma (AI Presentation Tool)
shortDescription: AI-powered tool for creating stunning presentations and documents.
longDescription: Gamma is an AI-powered presentation and document creation tool that allows users to generate visually appealing and engaging content in minutes. Instead of traditional slide-by-slide building, Gamma leverages AI to automatically design layouts, suggest content, and apply aesthetic themes based on user input (e.g., an outline or key points). It's ideal for quickly producing professional-looking proposals, reports, slide decks, and even web pages without requiring complex design skills. Gamma streamlines the content creation process, enabling users to focus on their message while the AI handles the visual polish.

title: Humata
shortDescription: AI-powered document analysis and summarization.
longDescription: Humata is an AI-powered tool designed to help users quickly extract insights, summarize, and interact with complex documents. It allows users to upload research papers, legal documents, reports, and more, then ask questions in natural language. Humata leverages AI to provide instant answers, generate summaries, and explain concepts within the documents, saving significant time on reading and analysis. It's an invaluable asset for researchers, students, legal professionals, and anyone who needs to process large volumes of information efficiently and gain quick comprehension from their textual data.
features: Supports various document formats (PDF, DOCX, TXT)

title: Any.do
shortDescription: Cross-platform task manager, planner, and calendar.
longDescription: Any.do is a popular cross-platform task manager, daily planner, and calendar app designed to help individuals organize their life and get things done. It offers a clean, intuitive interface with features like smart reminders, habit tracking, and grocery lists. Any.do syncs seamlessly across all devices, allowing users to manage tasks via voice input, integrate with calendars, and collaborate on shared lists. Its focus on simplicity, combined with robust functionality and a smart 'Plan My Day' feature, makes it an excellent choice for anyone looking to streamline their to-do lists and daily planning.

title: Coda
shortDescription: All-in-one doc that blends documents, spreadsheets, and apps.

Its 'Packs' feature integrates with popular apps, pulling data and enabling actions directly within the doc. Coda is ideal for teams seeking highly customizable and interconnected workspaces that evolve with their needs, turning simple documents into dynamic, functional tools.
features: Blends docs, spreadsheets, databases, and apps
Customizable templates for various use cases
Coda Packs for external app integrations

title: Slite

features: Templates for meeting notes, docs, etc.

title: Fibery

features: Relations between different types of data

title: Linear
shortDescription: Fast and streamlined issue tracker for high-performing teams.
longDescription: Linear is a fast, opinionated issue tracking and project management tool built for high-performing software development teams. Linear's 'Cycles' concept makes agile development feel natural, allowing teams to focus on getting tasks done without heavy overhead. features: Blazing fast interface and keyboard shortcuts

title: Journal (Apple App)
shortDescription: Official Apple journaling app for reflecting on daily moments with rich media.
longDescription: Apple's Journal app is an intuitive digital journaling experience designed for iPhone users, encouraging daily reflection and memory capture. It intelligently suggests moments to journal about based on user activity (photos, workouts, places, media), offering a personalized starting point for entries. Users can enrich their entries with photos, videos, audio recordings, and location data. The app provides writing prompts, mindful minutes tracking (integrating with Apple Health), and privacy features like passcode/Face ID protection. It's a seamlessly integrated tool for building a consistent journaling habit and preserving personal memories in rich detail.
features: Rich media support (photos, video, audio, location)

title: Reflection (AI Journal)
shortDescription: AI-enhanced journaling app with follow-up questions.
longDescription: Reflection is an AI-enhanced journaling app that aims to deepen self-reflection by asking intelligent follow-up questions based on your entries. While functioning as a standard digital journal, its AI component analyzes your text and prompts you to explore certain themes, emotions, or patterns, guiding you towards greater self-awareness. It's designed for users who want more than just a place to write, seeking an interactive experience that helps them uncover deeper insights and build a more consistent, meaningful journaling practice. This tool offers a blend of free-form writing and AI-guided introspection.

title: Odyssey AI (by Journey.Cloud)
shortDescription: AI journal assistant to chat with your journal and gain insights.
longDescription: Odyssey AI is an innovative AI journal assistant integrated into the Journey.Cloud journaling platform, allowing users to 'chat' with their journal entries. By posing questions in natural language, users can ask the AI about recurring themes, emotional patterns, or specific past events recorded in their journal. The AI sifts through entries to provide personalized responses and insights that reflect the user's own recorded experiences. Odyssey AI transforms journaling from a static record into a dynamic, interactive tool for self-discovery and deeper understanding of one's personal journey, making it a powerful feature for self-analysis.

Personalized insights based on past entries
Supports specific questions about feelings, people, events

shortDescription: Generates client libraries, server stubs, and API documentation from OpenAPI Specification.
longDescription: Swagger Codegen is an open-source code generator that creates client SDKs, server stubs, and API documentation from an OpenAPI Specification. This tool significantly accelerates API development by automating the repetitive task of writing boilerplate code for various programming languages and frameworks. By generating code directly from your API definition, Swagger Codegen ensures consistency, reduces manual errors, and allows developers to focus on core business logic rather than API integration details. It's an indispensable tool for maintaining a standardized and efficient API development workflow across diverse platforms.
features: Generates client SDKs for various languages
Generates server stubs for different frameworks
Reduces manual errors and ensures consistency

title: JSON Crack
shortDescription: Open-source visualization application for transforming various data formats into interactive graphs.
longDescription: JSON Crack is an innovative and open-source visualization application that transforms various data formats, including JSON, YAML, XML, CSV, and TOML, into interactive graphs or trees. It makes complex data structures easy to understand, explore, and validate. Beyond visualization, JSON Crack offers features like data format conversion (e.g., JSON to CSV), formatting and validation for clarity and accuracy, and code generation for TypeScript interfaces and Golang structs. It also includes advanced tools like JWT decoding and JSON Schema creation. Designed for readability and usability, all data processing is local to ensure privacy.
features: Visualizes JSON, YAML, XML, CSV, TOML as interactive graphs/trees
Converts data formats (e.g., JSON to CSV, XML to JSON)
Advanced tools (JWT decode, data randomization, jq/JSON path queries)
Exports visualizations as images (PNG, JPEG, SVG)

title: Dadroit JSON Viewer
shortDescription: Rapid JSON viewer to open and query large data files with exceptional performance.
longDescription: Dadroit JSON Viewer is a high-performance tool designed to rapidly open, view, and query extremely large JSON data files (up to gigabytes) that traditional tools struggle with. It treats JSON as a data format rather than plain text, providing a quick outline view with a tree representation. Dadroit boasts superior loading speeds, better RAM management, and faster search capabilities, making it ideal for troubleshooting issues in massive JSON log data and Browse JSON like an enterprise DBMS. It supports JSON-Lines and NDJSON, offers seamless API integration, and can combine multiple JSON files for simultaneous searching, all while being heavily optimized for efficiency and real-time results.
features: Opens and views large JSON files rapidly (gigabytes)
Treats JSON as data, not plain text
Tree representation for quick outline view
Exceptional loading speed and RAM management
Seamless API integration for downloading and viewing JSON data
Combines multiple JSON files for simultaneous searching
Monitors file changes and auto-refreshes view

title: Writer
shortDescription: AI content platform for enterprises ensuring brand voice consistency and factual accuracy.
longDescription: Writer is an advanced AI content platform specifically built for large businesses to ensure brand voice consistency and factual accuracy across all content. Unlike general LLMs, Writer offers proprietary LLMs and robust tools to prevent missteps, maintain brand guidelines, and verify claims. It helps teams collaborate on publishing while ensuring every piece of content aligns with the company's established voice and factual integrity. With features for content generation, editing, and governance, Writer provides a comprehensive solution for enterprises that need high-quality, on-brand, and reliable content at scale.
features: Proprietary AI models for enterprise use
Ensures brand voice consistency across content
Tools for factual accuracy and claim verification
Aids in content generation and editing
Designed for team collaboration on publishing
Focus on high-quality, reliable content at scale

title: Anyword
shortDescription: AI marketing copy generator that guides users step-by-step from prompt to final content.
longDescription: Anyword is an AI marketing copy generator designed to assist marketers in creating effective content through a structured, step-by-step process. Users start by generating various titles from a prompt, then select their favorite to create a detailed outline, and finally, generate the full content piece. This guided approach ensures that the generated copy is well-structured and relevant to the marketing goals. Anyword focuses on creating high-performing content by providing data-driven insights and predictive performance scores, making it an invaluable tool for marketers looking to optimize their campaigns and produce compelling copy efficiently.
features: Generates titles, outlines, and full content pieces
Data-driven insights and predictive performance scores
Variety of content types (ads, landing pages, emails, social posts)
Helps with brand voice and tone consistency

title: Jasper
shortDescription: Powerful AI content creation platform with dozens of templates for high-volume content.
longDescription: Jasper is a powerful AI content creation platform built for users who require a high volume of diverse content. It offers dozens of templates to jumpstart content creation, connects to the internet for research and sourcing, and can generate images with AI. From blog posts and social media captions to ad copy and email newsletters, Jasper covers a wide range of content needs. Its focus on efficiency and scalability makes it an excellent choice for marketers, writers, and businesses aiming to produce large amounts of high-quality content across various channels quickly and effectively.
features: Connects to the internet for research and sources
Supports various content types (blogs, social media, ads)
Integrates with popular tools and workflows

title: Perplexity AI
shortDescription: AI answer engine providing high-quality answers with sourced citations.
longDescription: Perplexity AI is an innovative AI answer engine that stands out for providing high-quality, direct answers to user queries, backed by clear and relevant source citations. It uses a combination of ranking signals from Google, Bing, and proprietary algorithms to deliver accurate and on-topic responses, even for complex follow-up questions. Perplexity is designed to be used alongside traditional search engines for in-depth research, making it ideal for students, researchers, and anyone needing reliable information quickly. Its focus on transparency through sourcing makes it a trustworthy tool for knowledge discovery.
features: AI answer engine for direct responses
Provides high-quality answers with source citations
Uses a combination of search engine ranking signals
Ideal for in-depth research and knowledge discovery
Available as web app and mobile app

title: Arc Search
shortDescription: AI-powered search experience within the Arc Browser for summarized results.
longDescription: Arc Search, part of the innovative Arc Browser project, integrates AI directly into the search experience (currently iOS and iPadOS only). Users can enter a question and tap 'Browse for me' to have Arc analyze top search results, break them down into sections, and summarize the content into a structured answer. This feature allows for a quick grasp of information without navigating multiple tabs. Users can easily toggle between the AI-generated overview and the classic Google search page, providing flexibility for different research needs. Arc Search is designed to streamline information consumption and enhance productivity for mobile users.
features: Analyzes top search results and structures answers
Toggle between AI overview and classic search results
Integrated within the Arc Browser ecosystem
Currently available on iOS and iPadOS

title: Zapier Agents
shortDescription: Experimental AI workspace to teach AI agents to automate workflows across thousands of apps.
longDescription: Zapier Agents is an experimental AI workspace that revolutionizes automation by allowing users to teach AI agents to work across thousands of applications. The interface is chat-based, making the creation of custom AI agents as simple as using a chatbot. These agents can learn from your actions and instructions to automate complex multi-step workflows, connect disparate tools, and handle repetitive tasks seamlessly. Zapier Agents empowers users to build highly personalized automation solutions without writing a single line of code, significantly boosting productivity and efficiency for individuals and businesses alike.
features: Experimental AI workspace for creating custom agents
Chat-based interface for easy agent creation
Teaches AI agents to automate workflows
Connects across thousands of applications (via Zapier)
Eliminates the need for coding in automation

title: Mattermost
shortDescription: Open-source, self-hosted chat service for team collaboration with full data control.
longDescription: Mattermost is an open-source, self-hosted chat service designed for secure team collaboration. Often compared to Slack, its key differentiator is the ability for businesses to self-host, granting them complete control over their data and ensuring maximum privacy and security. It offers robust features for team messaging, file sharing, and integrations with development tools, making it ideal for technical teams, especially in regulated industries or those with strict data sovereignty requirements. Mattermost provides a customizable and extensible platform for efficient communication and workflow management within an organization's own infrastructure.
features: Secure team messaging and file sharing
Integrates with developer tools (e.g., Jira, GitLab)
Comparable to Slack but with greater data control
Supports various integrations for workflow management

title: BasicOps
shortDescription: Easy-to-use, affordable all-in-one platform for task management and team collaboration.
longDescription: BasicOps is an intuitive and affordable all-in-one platform designed to centralize task management, communication, and file sharing for teams. It offers a minimalistic interface that simplifies task-based discussions, ensuring clarity on who is doing what. BasicOps includes features like real-time progress tracking, ready-made templates for quick project launches, and seamless integrations with popular apps like Slack and Jira. It's ideal for smaller teams and businesses looking for a comprehensive yet straightforward solution to enhance collaboration and efficiency without a massive budget, available consistently across desktop and mobile devices.
features: All-in-one platform for task management and collaboration
Centralizes chats, tasks, and file sharing
Ready-made templates for projects and campaigns
Consistent experience on mobile and desktop

title: Shortcut (formerly Clubhouse)
shortDescription: Collaboration tool unifying planning and development for product and engineering teams.
longDescription: Shortcut, formerly known as Clubhouse, is a robust collaboration tool specifically designed to bring product and engineering teams together in a cohesive and efficient manner. It aims to unify planning, development, and tracking into a single, streamlined experience. Shortcut offers a flexible workflow, allowing teams to manage stories, epics, and iterations with ease. It emphasizes a developer-friendly approach with powerful integrations and a clear overview of project progress. Ideal for agile teams, Shortcut simplifies complex software development processes, fostering better communication and faster delivery.
features: Designed for product and engineering teams
Flexible workflow for stories, epics, and iterations

title: Clockwise
shortDescription: AI-powered calendar assistant that optimizes team schedules to create focus time.
longDescription: Clockwise is an AI-powered calendar assistant that intelligently optimizes team schedules to create more focus time and minimize meeting conflicts. It automatically rearranges internal meetings, identifies flexible meeting times, and protects uninterrupted blocks for deep work. Clockwise integrates with popular calendar and project management tools, acting as a smart layer on top of your existing schedule. Ideal for remote and hybrid teams, it helps reduce meeting fatigue, improve productivity, and ensure that everyone has dedicated time for their most important tasks, ultimately promoting a healthier work-life balance.
features: Creates and protects focus time blocks
Integrates with Google Calendar and Outlook Calendar
Promotes deep work and work-life balance

title: Microsoft Lists
shortDescription: Smart tracking app in Microsoft 365 for organizing information and tracking work.
longDescription: Microsoft Lists is a smart tracking app within Microsoft 365 that helps teams organize information, track work, and manage data with ease. It allows users to create customizable lists from templates or from scratch, similar to spreadsheets but with enhanced features for collaboration, automation, and integration with other Microsoft apps. Teams can track issues, assets, routines, contacts, and more. With conditional formatting, alerts, and integration with Power Automate and Power Apps, Microsoft Lists goes beyond simple lists, enabling powerful workflows and real-time tracking for a variety of business needs.
features: Customizable lists from templates or scratch
Integrates with Power Automate and Power Apps

title: Microsoft Loop
shortDescription: Flexible canvas app for collaborative content, components, and workflows in Microsoft 365.
longDescription: Microsoft Loop is a transformative collaboration app within Microsoft 365, offering a flexible canvas for co-creation. It's built around 'Loop components' – portable pieces of content (like tables, task lists, notes) that stay in sync across different Microsoft 365 apps (Teams, Outlook, Word, etc.). This allows teams to brainstorm, plan, and create together in real-time, ensuring everyone is working on the latest information, no matter where they are. Loop combines a powerful canvas with fluid components and AI assistance, fostering agile workflows and breaking down silos between applications, making collaborative work more efficient and integrated.
features: Flexible canvas for collaborative content creation
Loop components: portable, synced content blocks
AI assistance for content generation and organization
Brainstorming, planning, and project tracking functionalities
Integrates deeply within the Microsoft 365 ecosystem

title: StudyPro AI Writer
shortDescription: Comprehensive AI platform for academic writing, combining content generation, rewriting, and plagiarism detection.
longDescription: StudyPro AI Writer is an all-in-one AI-powered platform designed to assist students and researchers with their academic writing needs. It integrates various functions, including generating structured content from prompts, rewriting text for clarity or conciseness, and performing plagiarism detection to ensure originality. During its beta phase, StudyPro offers core tools for free, making it a powerful and accessible resource for producing well-structured and integrity-focused academic papers, essays, and assignments.
features: AI-powered content generation for structured academic writing
Text rewriting and paraphrasing for improved clarity
Citation tools for automatic formatting (multiple styles)

title: Samwell.ai
shortDescription: AI writing tool focused on generating structured academic content quickly with citation and outlining features.
longDescription: Samwell.ai is a newer AI writing tool specifically designed to help users generate structured academic content rapidly. It focuses on producing complete essays or assignments through guided input rather than starting from a blank page. Key features include prompt-based writing generation at the paragraph level, automatic citation formatting in various styles, an outline builder for pre-drafting text, and summarization capabilities for notes. Samwell.ai is ideal for students and academics looking for efficient ways to draft and organize their written work.

title: Reflection (Journaling App)
shortDescription: AI-enhanced journaling app for mindful growth with guided reflection and cross-platform flexibility.
longDescription: Reflection is an AI-enhanced journaling app that promotes mindful growth through guided reflection. It combines innovative AI capabilities with thoughtful design to create an intimate and expansive space for personal introspection. The app offers features like AI-powered insights, guided prompts, and support for multimedia entries. It balances privacy with cross-platform availability (iOS, Android, macOS, Web), making it a versatile tool for daily journaling, mood tracking, and self-improvement.
features: Calendar view and 'On This Day' memories

title: YoroForm
shortDescription: AI-powered form builder that creates intelligent, adaptive forms with seamless workflow automation.
longDescription: YoroForm revolutionizes form creation by using AI to build intelligent, adaptive forms that dynamically adjust based on user inputs. It provides a drag-and-drop builder for easy form design and integrates effortlessly with various business applications for seamless workflow automation. YoroForm offers AI-driven data validation and smart form routing, making it an ideal choice for enterprises looking to optimize data collection, streamline operations, and create dynamic, smart forms that adapt to their specific needs.
features: Adaptive forms based on user input

title: Weavely (AI Form Builder)
shortDescription: AI form builder that quickly generates forms from prompts, with design flexibility and real-time iteration.
longDescription: Weavely is an AI form builder that streamlines the creation process by generating basic forms from simple text prompts. It emphasizes design flexibility, allowing users to adjust form elements like colors and layouts through AI commands. A key feature is real-time iteration, where the AI helps refine the form after the initial draft. Weavely aims to make form building faster and more intuitive, offering features like turning PDFs, slides, or screenshots into forms and understanding voice prompts, ensuring a quick and adaptable solution for various form needs.
features: AI-powered smart form generation from text prompts
Design flexibility with AI commands for colors, layout, fonts
Real-time iteration and refinement of forms
Ability to convert PDFs, slides, or screenshots into forms
Free import from Google Forms and Typeform
Focus on user experience and brand consistency

title: Linear
shortDescription: AI-powered tool for roadmapping, issue tracking, and product delivery for fast-moving tech teams.
longDescription: Linear is a highly favored collaboration tool for fast-moving product and engineering teams, unifying roadmapping, issue tracking, and product delivery. Its clean interface and smart automation features streamline workflows. Linear's AI capabilities include auto-generated timelines and changelogs, summarized bug reports and task updates, and suggested next steps based on project activity. It helps teams plan, track, and execute work quickly, making it ideal for those who prioritize efficiency and a clear overview of their development cycles.
features: AI for roadmapping and issue tracking
Summarized bug reports and task updates
Suggested next steps based on project activity
Designed for product and engineering teams
Facilitates fast planning, tracking, and execution

title: Supernormal
shortDescription: AI tool for automatic meeting notes and action items from Zoom, Google Meet, and Teams.
longDescription: Supernormal is an AI-powered tool that automates the tedious task of taking meeting notes. It seamlessly records your meetings (across Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams), transcribes them, and then generates action-ready summaries with identified action items. This allows remote teams and busy project managers to have comprehensive documentation without distractions during the meeting itself. With features like instant notes and calendar-based auto-joining, Supernormal ensures that critical information and follow-up tasks are never missed.
features: Generates instant meeting notes and summaries
Integrates with Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams
Ideal for remote teams and busy professionals

title: Forecast (Project Management)
shortDescription: AI-powered platform for project planning, resource allocation, and risk forecasting.
longDescription: Forecast is an AI-powered project management platform designed for data-driven decision-making. It utilizes AI to analyze past work, predict project risks, and identify potential timeline issues, offering smart insights for planning and resource allocation. Ideal for agencies and PMOs with complex scopes and large teams, Forecast helps optimize resource suggestions, detect risks, and fine-tune timelines, ensuring projects are delivered efficiently and profitably.
features: Analyzes past work to predict risks and timeline issues
Suitable for agencies and large teams

title: Scite
shortDescription: AI research assistant providing verifiable insights and Smart Citations from scholarly content.
longDescription: Scite is an advanced AI research assistant that revolutionizes how academics and professionals discover and evaluate scholarly content. It provides verifiable insights by combining access to open-access and paywalled research with its unique Smart Citations database, which analyzes and classifies over a billion citations. Scite highlights whether research papers support or contrast specific claims, minimizing the risk of hallucinations often found in general LLMs. Its 'Assistant by scite' feature allows users to get ideas for search strategies, build reference lists, and even draft content, all backed by real references and rigorous analysis, making it an indispensable tool for trustworthy research.
features: AI-powered search across scholarly content (open access & paywalled)
Smart Citations database analyzes and classifies citations
Classifies papers based on supporting or contrasting evidence
Minimizes AI hallucinations with verifiable sources
AI Assistant for search strategies, reference list building, content drafting
Helps evaluate how references are used
Trusted by universities, publishers, and corporations

title: Yaware TimeTracker
shortDescription: Comprehensive time tracking solution with automatic activity categorization and strategic insights.
longDescription: Yaware TimeTracker is a comprehensive time tracking solution designed to address the full spectrum of business time management needs. Its standout feature is automatic activity categorization, which transforms raw time data into strategic insights without requiring manual input from employees. This allows businesses to understand productivity patterns, optimize workflows, and gain actionable insights effortlessly. Yaware TimeTracker provides a balance of easy implementation, automatic tracking, and detailed reports, making it suitable for improving efficiency and decision-making.
features: Transforms raw time data into strategic insights
No manual employee input required for categorization
Detailed reports on time usage and productivity
